title: Additional Enchanted Miner
description: This mod adds some miners like BC's quarry.
body:
This mod adds some advanced miners which can have enchantments.
It allows automatically collecting resources with Fortune or Silk touch.
Fluids are automatically removed by QuarryPlus with Pump Plus or Pump Module. More advanced machine, Chunk Destroyer, will remove fluids without settings. (Fabric version is more simple. Machines can remove fluids without any special settings)

Machines can accept EU and Forge Energy. Some version(1.19.2) can accepts EU from IC2 classic.

This mod requires [Scalable Cat's Force](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalable-cats-force) in all platform.
Fabric ~1.20.x also requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).

[Link to Curse Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-enchanted-miner)
